summary: Testing iteration 12 - Verified Manager Dashboard formatting fixes and Rate Management multiple saves functionality. Both features are working correctly.

issues: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility improvement suggested but code already has aria-describedby='summary-dialog-desc' attribute. May be a timing/hydration issue.

passed_tests: Rate Management - Normal rates saved multiple times successfully
Rate Management - AJPL rates saved multiple times successfully
Manager Dashboard - KPI cards properly display currency values (₹0, 0, 1, 1) without overflow on mobile (390x844)
Manager Dashboard - Bill cards properly contain all information: customer name, bill number (truncated), executive, status badge, amount
Manager Dashboard - Bill number column uses truncate class to prevent overflow
Manager Dashboard - Table uses table-fixed with defined column widths (180px for Bill #)
Admin All Bills - Table properly displays all 11 columns without overflow
Admin All Bills - Bill numbers display properly with monospace font and truncation
Admin All Bills - Currency values (Subtotal, GST, Grand Total) properly formatted
Bill Detail Page - All item details (Gold Value, Making Charges, Stone Charges) display correctly
Summary Dialog - Opens when Summary button clicked (console shows DialogContent warnings confirming mount)
API: GET /api/bills/{id}/summary returns properly formatted data
critical_code_review_comments: ManagerDashboard.js formatting is correctly implemented with: table-fixed, truncate on bill numbers, overflow-hidden on cards, w-[calc(100vw-2rem)] on mobile dialog
BillCard component has proper min-w-0, flex-1, overflow-hidden, truncate classes
BillTable uses table-fixed with specific column widths (w-[180px], w-[150px], etc.)
Summary Dialog has max-h-[85vh], overflow-y-auto for scrollable content
RateManagement.js saveRates() function works correctly for both normal and ajpl rate types

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All formatting verified, dialog opening confirmed but screenshot capture timing issue)

admin.method: Admin Login link on login page

manager.method: OTP-based login (request OTP, then check admin dashboard for code)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test bill: ID=a72b0879-2133-4c9f-8cf6-9611a7bf47dd (BILL-20260214145307-CEC7) with gold Necklace item including making charges and stone charges
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified: 1) Rate Management allows multiple saves per day for both Normal and AJPL rates - working, 2) Manager Dashboard formatting fixes verified - bill numbers truncate properly, KPI cards contain values, bill cards have overflow-hidden, 3) Summary Dialog opens but timing-sensitive to capture. OTP delivery is MOCKED - codes shown on admin dashboard.

rate_management_multiple_saves.details: Admin can save Normal rates and AJPL rates multiple times per day. Toast shows 'NORMAL rates saved!' and 'AJPL rates saved!' on each save.

manager_dashboard_table_formatting.details: Table uses table-fixed with w-[180px] for Bill # column. Bill numbers use truncate class. All columns have defined widths preventing overflow.

manager_dashboard_card_formatting.details: BillCard has overflow-hidden on container, truncate on text elements (customer name, bill number, executive). Amount displays with whitespace-nowrap.

manager_dashboard_kpi_cards.details: KPI cards have overflow-hidden class. Currency values display properly with mono font class. 2x2 grid layout on mobile.

summary_dialog_formatting.details: Dialog has w-[calc(100vw-2rem)] for mobile, max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto. Item details use gap-2, overflow-hidden, truncate on values.

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes are shown on admin dashboard instead of being sent via email/SMS
